Event: Mushroom Loot - April 2026
Event Date: 09/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SL52
Amber Claw Ax's Soul

Every 6 seconds, the fighter deals 750000 physical damage to all enemy fighters and inflicts injury on 2 random enemy fighters. Their maximum health is reduced by 30% for the duration of the injury (the injury can last until the end of the battle). Maximum 1 effects. Every 3 seconds, the fighter tries to remove the injury. With a 40% chance, this may succeed and then the effect is completely removed; if the injury cannot be removed, the fighter is stunned for 2 seconds.

Requirements: 98-100
